User.title: User
User.description: A user of the blood donation platform.

donorId.description: The user's unique readable ID (e.g. ROKTO-1234).

fcmToken.description: The user's Firebase Cloud Messaging token.

lastDonationDate.description: The date of the user's last donation.

isProfileComplete.description: Whether the user has completed their profile.

lastReadNotifications.description: When the user last read notifications.

updatedAt.description: When the user was last updated.

requesterUid.description: The UID of the user who created the request.

requesterName.description: The name of the user who created the request.

requesterPhoto.description: The photo URL of the user who created the request.

guardianName.description: The name of the patient's guardian (রোগীর অভিভাবকের নাম).

amount.description: The amount of blood needed (রক্তের পরিমাণ).

hospitalName.description: The name of the hospital (হাসপাতালের নাম).

date.description: The date of blood donation (রক্তদানের তারিখ).

location.description: The location for blood donation (রক্তদানের স্থান).

coordinates.description: The geographical coordinates of the request location.

fulfilledBy.description: The name or ID of the donor who fulfilled the request.

fulfilledByUid.description: The UID of the donor who fulfilled the request.

updatedAt.description: When the request was last updated.

Donor.title: Donor
Donor.description: A public profile for a blood donor.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user.

donorId.description: The user's unique readable ID (e.g. ROKTO-1234).

displayName.description: The display name of the donor.

photoURL.description: The URL of the donor's profile photo.

bloodGroup.description: The blood group of the donor.

isAvailable.description: Whether the donor is currently available to donate.

lastDonationDate.description: The date of the donor's last donation.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the donor profile was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the donor profile was last updated.

DonationRecord.title: DonationRecord
DonationRecord.description: A record of a successful blood donation.

requestId.description: The ID of the blood request.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: A chat conversation between two users.

participants.description: The UIDs of the participants in the chat.

participantNames.description: A map of participant UIDs to their display names.

participantPhotos.description: A map of participant UIDs to their photo URLs.

lastMessage.description: The text of the last message sent in the chat.

lastMessageTime.description: The timestamp of the last message sent in the chat.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the chat was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the chat was last updated.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: A message sent in a chat conversation.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the message was sent.

/chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Stores messages within a chat conversation.
